description:
About the job

Kenvue Is Currently Recruiting For A:

Programa de Interns Kenvue 2026.2 | MARKETING | México - Ciudad de México

What We Do

At Kenvue, we realize the extraordinary power of everyday care. Built on over a century of heritage and rooted in science, we’re the house of iconic brands - including NEUTROGENA®, AVEENO®, TYLENOL®, LISTERINE®, JOHNSON’S® and BAND-AID® that you already know and love. Science is our passion; care is our talent.

Who We Are

Our global team is ~ 22,000 brilliant people with a workplace culture where every voice matters, and every contribution is appreciated. We are passionate about insights, innovation and committed to delivering the best products to our customers. With expertise and empathy, being a Kenvuer means having the power to impact millions of people every day. We put people first, care fiercely, earn trust with science and solve with courage – and have brilliant opportunities waiting for you! Join us in shaping our future–and yours. For more information, click here.

Role Reports To:

SUP REC E SELECAO

Location:

Latin America, Mexico, Distrito Federal, Mexico City

Work Location:

Hybrid

What You Will Do

Encuentra tu futuro en Kenvue

¿Sueñas con trabajar con marcas icónicas que impactan las vidas de millones de personas en todo el mundo todos los días?

¿Tienes pasión por hacer que las cosas sucedan, buscas oportunidades para aprender y crecer con proyectos de alto impacto?

¡Entonces esta es tu oportunidad!

El Programa de Interns de Kenvue está abierto a cualquier persona que quiera trabajar con un propósito en un entorno de innovación y ciencia, con equipos extraordinarios y grandes oportunidades de desarrollo.

¡ Regístrate ahora!

EL PROGRAMA

El Programa de Interns Kenvue es tu puerta de entrada a desafíos reales y a la conexión con excelentes equipos, que garantizan el desarrollo y el aprendizaje profesional.

Nuestro programa cuenta con un plan de desarrollo dedicado a ofrecer una experiencia de aprendizaje completa, alineando la teoría con la práctica.

Esto significa que desarrollarás tus habilidades técnicas e interpersonales en la formación y en la vida cotidiana, ¡con proyectos y desafíos de alto impacto!

Increíble, ¿verdad?

¡Ven a descubrir tu lado extraordinario todos los días! Encuentra tu futuro en Kenvue.

Inicio de la práctica/pasantía: agosto 2026

Ciudad de México – modelo híbrido

ÁREAS DE ATUACIÓN

VACANTE 1

Área: SKIN HEALTH

Descripción:

Estamos buscando un/a practicante de Marketing motivado/a y responsable para unirse a nuestro equipo en Skin Health Brands. Esta posición de medio tiempo ofrece una oportunidad única para adquirir experiencia valiosa en la industria del cuidado de la piel, trabajando de cerca con los Brand Managers.

El/la practicante será responsable de dar seguimiento a diversos proyectos, revisar tendencias de mercado y analizar las ventas y la ejecución en el punto de venta (shopper execution). Este rol es ideal para una persona proactiva, con ganas de aprender y contribuir al éxito de nuestra marca.

Actividades:


Apoyar a los Brand Managers en el seguimiento y gestión de actividades de marketing en curso.
Realizar investigaciones de mercado para identificar tendencias emergentes, preferencias de los consumidores y actividades de la competencia.
Analizar datos de ventas e insights de shopper para respaldar las estrategias de marketing y la toma de decisiones.
Colaborar con equipos multifuncionales para asegurar la ejecución efectiva de las iniciativas de marketing.
Preparar informes y presentaciones que resuman hallazgos, insights y recomendaciones sobre el desempeño de la marca.
Apoyar el desarrollo de materiales de marketing.
Participar en reuniones de equipo y contribuir con ideas para la mejora e innovación de la marca.
Realizar un seguimiento cercano para alcanzar el máximo potencial, apoyando el monitoreo de variables clave como distribución, sell-in y participación de mercado.
Apoyar a los gerentes en actividades clave, alineando esfuerzos entre áreas para asegurar el cumplimiento de procesos y la ejecución completa.


VACANTE 2

Área: Marketing Self-Care

Descripción:

Estamos buscando un/a practicante de Marketing motivado/a y responsable para unirse a nuestro equipo de Self-Care. Esta posición de medio tiempo ofrece una oportunidad única para adquirir experiencia valiosa en la industria OTC, trabajando de cerca con los Brand Managers.

El/la practicante será responsable de dar seguimiento a diversos proyectos, revisar tendencias de mercado y analizar las ventas y la ejecución en el punto de venta (shopper execution). Este rol es ideal para una persona proactiva, con muchas ganas de aprender y contribuir al éxito de nuestra marca.

Actividades:


Apoyar a los Brand Managers en el seguimiento y la gestión de proyectos en curso para las marcas de Self-Care.
Realizar investigaciones y análisis de mercado para identificar tendencias emergentes, preferencias de los consumidores y actividades de la competencia.
Analizar datos de ventas, prescripciones e insights de shopper para respaldar las estrategias de marketing y la toma de decisiones.
Colaborar con equipos multifuncionales para asegurar la ejecución efectiva de las iniciativas de marketing.
Preparar informes y presentaciones que resuman hallazgos, insights y recomendaciones sobre el desempeño de la marca.
Apoyar el desarrollo de materiales de marketing junto con el equipo multifuncional.
Participar en reuniones de equipo y contribuir con ideas para la mejora e innovación de la marca.
Realizar un seguimiento cercano para alcanzar el máximo potencial, apoyando a los gerentes en el monitoreo de variables clave como distribución, sell-in, participación de mercado y prescripciones.
Apoyar a los gerentes en actividades clave, alineando esfuerzos entre áreas para asegurar el cumplimiento de los procesos y la ejecución completa.


VACANTE 3

Área:  Shopper Marketing Intern

Jefe: Karen Martinez

Descripción:

El/la Practicante de Shopper Marketing es responsable de apoyar y ejecutar iniciativas estratégicas de marketing para impulsar el engagement del consumidor y aumentar las ventas, colaborando en diversos proyectos y brindando soporte al equipo en la implementación de estrategias.

Actividades:


Desarrollar estrategias innovadoras de shopper marketing para impulsar las ventas y la visibilidad de nuestras marcas.
Colaborar con equipos multifuncionales para la ejecución de campañas de shopper marketing.
Analizar insights del comprador y tendencias del mercado para identificar oportunidades de crecimiento.
Crear experiencias de compra atractivas e interactivas, tanto en canales digitales como físicos.
Colaborar con equipos multifuncionales para desarrollar campañas de shopper marketing que conecten con el público objetivo.
Mantenerse actualizado(a) sobre tendencias de la industria y mejores prácticas en shopper marketing.
Contribuir a la identificación y resolución de incidencias, así como a la mejora del desempeño general de Shopper Marketing.
Investigar e implementar nuevas tecnologías que permitan mejorar la eficiencia en los procesos de desarrollo.


If you are an individual with a disability, please check our Disability Assistance page for information on how to request an accommodation.

title: Business Campaign Strategy Intern
skills: Analyze campaign performance data and generate weekly dashboards and insights that identify trends, anomalies, and optimization opportunities, contributing to a 10–20% improvement in campaign KPIs.

Support the planning and execution of cross-channel acquisition and retention campaigns (in-app, push, SMS, paid social), coordinating with product, operations, and creative teams to ensure timely launches and consistent messaging.
Build and maintain audience segmentation and targeting logic using customer and driver behavioral data to improve precision targeting and lift conversion rates by testing new segment strategies.
Develop A/B test plans and track results for creative, channel mix, and incentive structures, documenting learnings and recommending scalable changes to reduce CPA and increase LTV.
Prepare concise business-facing reports and presentation decks that translate campaign findings into actionable recommendations for regional managers and senior stakeholders.
Monitor campaign budget spend and pacing, flagging risks and proposing reallocation strategies to maximize ROI while ensuring compliance with local market guidelines.
Assist in local market research and competitive benchmarking to adapt global campaign frameworks to regional behaviors and regulatory constraints, ensuring relevance and compliance.
Last years of bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Business, Economics, Data Analytics, or a related field is preferred.
Strong analytical skills with hands-on experience using Excel, SQL, or analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Looker, Tableau) to manipulate datasets and derive actionable insights.
Proactive, collaborative attitude with experience working in cross-functional teams and the adaptability to prioritize tasks in a fast-paced, high-volume environment.
Attention to detail and a strong sense of ownership, able to manage campaign tracking, budget pacing, and documentation for multiple regional pilots concurrently.
description:
About the job

About The Company

DiDi Global Inc. is the world’s leading mobility technology platform. It offers a wide range of app-based services across markets including Asia-Pacific, Latin America and Africa, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, chauffeur, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as auto solutions, food delivery, intra-city freight, and financial services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.

For more information, please visit: www.didiglobal.com/news

About The Team/role

As a BC (Business Campaign) Campaign Strategy Intern at DiDi, you will support the design, execution, and performance analysis of marketing and activation campaigns that drive driver and rider acquisition, retention, and platform engagement across multiple regions. Your work will directly contribute to measurable increases in user activation rates, cost-per-acquisition improvement, and campaign ROI while helping the campaign strategy team scale targeted programs across DiDi’s large, multi-product ecosystem.

In this role, you'll be...


Analyze campaign performance data and generate weekly dashboards and insights that identify trends, anomalies, and optimization opportunities, contributing to a 10–20% improvement in campaign KPIs.
Support the planning and execution of cross-channel acquisition and retention campaigns (in-app, push, SMS, paid social), coordinating with product, operations, and creative teams to ensure timely launches and consistent messaging.
Build and maintain audience segmentation and targeting logic using customer and driver behavioral data to improve precision targeting and lift conversion rates by testing new segment strategies.
Develop A/B test plans and track results for creative, channel mix, and incentive structures, documenting learnings and recommending scalable changes to reduce CPA and increase LTV.
Prepare concise business-facing reports and presentation decks that translate campaign findings into actionable recommendations for regional managers and senior stakeholders.
Monitor campaign budget spend and pacing, flagging risks and proposing reallocation strategies to maximize ROI while ensuring compliance with local market guidelines.
Assist in local market research and competitive benchmarking to adapt global campaign frameworks to regional behaviors and regulatory constraints, ensuring relevance and compliance.



We're eager to be in touch because you have...


Last years of bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Business, Economics, Data Analytics, or a related field is preferred.
Strong analytical skills with hands-on experience using Excel, SQL, or analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Looker, Tableau) to manipulate datasets and derive actionable insights.
Proactive, collaborative attitude with experience working in cross-functional teams and the adaptability to prioritize tasks in a fast-paced, high-volume environment.
Attention to detail and a strong sense of ownership, able to manage campaign tracking, budget pacing, and documentation for multiple regional pilots concurrently.



You'll love working at DiDi because...

We create user value

We strive to always create valuable experiences for our users in everything we do. Our focus is to always innovate new experiences that are safe, pleasant and efficient.

We are data-driven

We are strong believers in making informed decisions, that’s why we are data-driven. We can better navigate the business landscape strategically by analyzing valuable metrics.

Win-win Collaboration

Success is a team sport. When we work to help our partners and colleagues win, we win, too. While keeping everyone's best interest at heart, we communicate with candor and execute with excellence in all we do.

We believe in integrity

Integrity is at the very core of our business. We are people who always want to do the right thing. Our intentions are sincere, we speak our minds and listen to each other.

Growth

We always strive to do better. That means venturing beyond our comfort zones, learning from our mistakes, and helping each other grow.

Diversity and Inclusion

Diversity is one of our biggest strengths. Our differences are what make us distinct. We respect each other and believe in equal opportunities for all.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams

At DiDi, we believe that our differences are our biggest source of strength. That’s why we are committed to promoting equal opportunities to all candidates and employees as an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Employment and advancement decisions at DiDi are always made based on the needs of the position and the qualifications of the candidate. We do not discriminate against any employee or applicant based on their gender, age, sexual orientation, nationality, marital status, pregnancy/maternity, disability, race, religion and beliefs, or any other status protected by applicable laws wherever we operate.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams, and a workplace that is free from discrimination and harassment, because that’s how we create better products and services, make better decisions and better serve the communities we’re a part of.

title: Creator Incubation Project Intern (TikTok Shop - Mexico Operation) - 2026 Start (BS/MS)
skills: Assist in empowering and incubating high-potential e-commerce creators by providing daily support, guidance, and encouragement on content production techniques.
Actively communicate and build strong, trust-based relationships with creators and agency hosts, ensuring they feel supported and motivated to achieve their sales goals.
Support the team in matching curated product assortments with the right creators, helping to brainstorm and co-create engaging e-commerce content (short videos & livestreams).
Help organize and facilitate training sessions for livestream hosts, assisting them in understanding livestreaming tools, refining on-camera scripts, and improving viewer interaction.
Assist in tracking and analyzing post-livestream data. Help translate these data insights into easy-to-understand, actionable advice that creators can use to optimize their future sessions.
Guide creators to maintain high-quality content standards and adhere to platform guidelines, fostering a healthy e-commerce ecosystem.
Currently pursuing an Undergraduate/Master in Business or a related fields
Strong skills in interpersonal and communication; you are a "people person" who genuinely enjoys interacting, listening, and building rapport with diverse individuals.
Proactive fast-learner, open to navigating uncertain and exploratory business scenarios.
Applicants are kindly requested to submit an English-language resume.
Proven skills in analytical with a willingness to learn how to use data to formulate actionable strategies.
Strong analytical skills, with a structured and critical approach to problem-solving;
Experience in TikTok platform, short-form video trends, and the livestreaming e-commerce ecosystem.
description:
About the job

Responsibilities

Team Introduction

The e-commerce industry has grown tremendously recently, becoming a hotly contested space among leading Internet companies. Its future growth cannot be underestimated.

With millions of loyal users globally, we believe TikTok is an ideal platform to deliver a brand new and better e-commerce experience to our users. We are looking for passionate and talented people to join our campaign team. Together, we can build an e-commerce ecosystem that is innovative, secure, and intuitive for our users.

Step into a dynamic role with the Mexico operation team, where you'll play a vital part in executing varies campaigns for some of the most iconic brands. Be at the forefront of innovation, contributing to cutting-edge campaigns and driving forward the yearly strategic modules that define success. In this role, you’ll help power the future of e-commerce, supporting high-impact initiatives that connect brands with consumers in meaningful ways. Join us as we shape the future of e-commerce here at TikTok Shop!

As a project intern, you will have the opportunity to engage in impactful short-term projects that provide you with a glimpse of professional real-world experience. You will gain practical skills through on-the-job learning in a fast-paced work environment and develop a deeper understanding of your career interests.

Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis - we encourage you to apply early.

Successful candidates must be able to commit to at least 3 months long internship period.

Responsibilities:


 Assist in empowering and incubating high-potential e-commerce creators by providing daily support, guidance, and encouragement on content production techniques.
 Actively communicate and build strong, trust-based relationships with creators and agency hosts, ensuring they feel supported and motivated to achieve their sales goals.
 Support the team in matching curated product assortments with the right creators, helping to brainstorm and co-create engaging e-commerce content (short videos & livestreams).
 Help organize and facilitate training sessions for livestream hosts, assisting them in understanding livestreaming tools, refining on-camera scripts, and improving viewer interaction.
 Assist in tracking and analyzing post-livestream data. Help translate these data insights into easy-to-understand, actionable advice that creators can use to optimize their future sessions.
 Guide creators to maintain high-quality content standards and adhere to platform guidelines, fostering a healthy e-commerce ecosystem.


Qualifications

Minimum Qualifications


 Currently pursuing an Undergraduate/Master in Business or a related fields
 Strong skills in interpersonal and communication; you are a "people person" who genuinely enjoys interacting, listening, and building rapport with diverse individuals.
 Proactive fast-learner, open to navigating uncertain and exploratory business scenarios.
 Applicants are kindly requested to submit an English-language resume.
 Proven skills in analytical with a willingness to learn how to use data to formulate actionable strategies.


Preferred Qualifications


 Strong analytical skills, with a structured and critical approach to problem-solving;
 Experience in TikTok platform, short-form video trends, and the livestreaming e-commerce ecosystem.


Job Information

About TikTok

TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.

Why Join Us

Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.

We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.

Diversity & Inclusion

TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.

TikTok Accommodation

TikTok is committed to providing reasonable accommodations in our recruitment processes for candidates with disabilities, pregnancy, sincerely held religious beliefs or other reasons protected by applicable laws. If you need assistance or a reasonable accommodation, please reach out to us at https://tinyurl.com/RA-request

description:
About the job

To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.

Job Category

Marketing & Communications

Job Details

About Salesforce

Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.

Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.

The Mission

This role sits on the Slack Creative team and partners directly with our Design Director for Brand Systems, Events, and Web — producing programs and projects across all three verticals. While the title is producer, our team plays hybrid roles throughout the course of a project. Some days that looks like strategic program management; other days it's hands-on creative production. The throughline is ownership: you drive the work from kickoff to delivery, whatever shape that takes.

What You’ll Do

These responsibilities span all three verticals — web, brand systems, and events. You'll move between strategic planning and tactical execution depending on what the work needs.

Production & Program Management


Lead project scoping, timeline development, and resourcing across a high volume of simultaneous projects — from small updates to large-scale productions
Define AI forward production strategies and operational frameworks that allow complex work to scale smoothly
Oversee detailed production timelines, project workbacks, and cross-team coordination
Manage agency partners and creative vendors
Anticipate risks, connect silos, socialize changes, and always come with a backup plan


Collaboration & Visibility


Build strong relationships and trust with partner teams, ensuring collaboration at every stage
Drive visibility and clear communication across creative leadership and cross-functional partners
Collaborate with the creative team to translate bold ideas into execution, ensuring the vision comes through in every detail
Serve as the operational hub across internal stakeholders and external partners from kickoff through delivery


AI Implementation & Workflow Design


Develop and implement AI-forward project management workflows and tooling across web, brand, and event workstreams
Identify repeatable processes and build AI-assisted solutions that reduce manual overhead
Build generative workflows for design template production that accelerate output without compromising brand standards


What You Should Bring


Background in corporate events production, including budget management, and vendor sourcing
Experience producing website content across design, engineering, and marketing stakeholders
Hands-on experience with brand systems and design template management
Demonstrated experience implementing AI tools into production or project management workflows
Strategic and creative simultaneously — you hold the vision while managing the details
Calm under pressure- you manage competing priorities in a fast paced environment with good judgment
A clear, confident communicator who earns trust across teams


Why Slack?

At Slack, we're on a mission to make work life simpler, more pleasant, and more productive. Our Brand & Creative team plays a critical role in bringing that mission to life through world-class design and storytelling. You'll have the opportunity to shape how millions of people experience Slack across our digital touch-points.

Our Values


Empathy - We care about the people we work with and the people we serve
Courtesy - We treat each other with respect
Thriving - We create an environment where people can do their best work
Craftsmanship - We take pride in the quality of our work


To Apply

Please submit your resume, portfolio, and a brief note about why you're excited about this role.

Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer committed to building a diverse and inclusive workforce.

Unleash Your Potential

When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and be your best, and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can do your best. Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.

Accommodations

If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.

Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.

Posting Statement

Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: Marketing Specialist
skills: Executes and participates in general marketing functions that are more routine in nature, require smaller spend budgets and requires minimal contact with clients. Requires oversight with developing approach for more complex marketing functions which include higher thresholds of spend levels.

Participates in collaboration with business development, customers, product management, sales and other business partners in support of client-customized, content-rich marketing collateral, such as proposals, corporate communication, and other marketing related information for marketing functions more routine in nature. Will make recommendations regarding marketing process. Supports the marketing approach within strategy and budget.
Supports the development of strategic marketing plans for existing lines and participates in the interpretation of plans into “big ideas” to extend the company’s brand vision.
Supports the strategic direction, growth, and vision of assigned strategic growth objectives for the segment and manages the execution of programs. Has minimal client contact.
Supports the development of multiple pieces of promotional and advertising materials, such as press releases, social and digital media published on-line via web sites, twitter, etc.

Based on assigned strategic growth initiatives, builds and maintains existing relationships with internal contacts, external communications consultants and/or agencies. Participates in meetings with internal and/or external clients to understand their ongoing strategies and how relationships can be strengthened within the client’s organization.
Supports the development of product promotion and launch strategies.

Beginning to act as a marketing advocate, communications consultant, and/or liaison for business support units and/or operational units within the organization. Supports communications with leaders in those units on specific communications issues and strategic growth initiatives and coordinates appropriate marketing resources to achieve their functional goals.

Recommends measurements for return on investment (ROI) for marketing projects within the specific goals of building and delivering campaigns, such as internal and external communications, product launches, new business units, acquisitions, and RFP/RFI proposals within planned scope, schedule, cost and quality, and trade shows/events. Tracks costs against measurements.
Bachelor's Degree
Relevant Experience or Degree in: Digital Marketing , Advertising ,
Typically Minimum 3 Years Relevant Exp
Prefer marketing service or marketing agency experience. Prefer sales force and email automation experience. Prefer payments industry experience.

Skills / Knowledge - Having wide-ranging experience, uses professional concepts and company objectives to resolve moderately complex issues in creative and effective ways. Having ownership of a sub-function, account or matrix management responsibilities, applies knowledge to meet goals, maintain relationships, propose opportunities to expand the business, and lead matrix teams. Some barriers to entry exist at this level (e.g., dept./peer review).

Job Complexity - Works on complex issues where analysis of situations or data requires an in-depth evaluation of variable factors. Exercises judgment in selecting methods, techniques and evaluation criteria for obtaining results. Networks with key contacts outside own area of expertise. Communication skills - Including communication with internal or external audiences

title: SEO Specialist Part time Bilingüe Remoto
description:
About the job

🚀 SEO Specialist (Part Time)




100% Remoto




¡Esta oportunidad es para ti! Estamos buscando un/a SEO Specialist part time, analítico/a, proactivo/a y orientado/a a resultados, que quiera potenciar el posicionamiento digital de nuestros clientes.




💡 ¿Qué harás en este rol?

Serás responsable de impulsar la visibilidad orgánica y el rendimiento digital a través de estrategias SEO efectivas:




✅ Investigación de palabras clave y definición de estrategias SEO

✅ Optimización on-page (titles, meta descriptions, headers y contenido)

✅ Auditorías SEO técnicas (velocidad, indexación, mobile, rastreo, accesibilidad)

✅ Análisis y monitoreo del rendimiento (Google Analytics & Search Console)

✅ Implementación de SEO local (Google My Business y citas)

✅ Colaboración con equipos de marketing, contenido y desarrollo

✅ Seguimiento de rankings, tráfico y conversiones + reporting accionable

✅ Actualización constante frente a cambios de algoritmo

🎯 Requisitos

· Más de 2 años de experiencia en SEO técnico

· Nivel de inglés avanzado B2+, C1

· Familiaridad con herramientas de análisis e informes (Google Analytics, Search Console)

✨ Trabajo 100% remoto

✨ Proyectos diversos y retadores

✨ Oportunidad de crecimiento y aprendizaje continuo

description:
About the job

Position

Digital Marketing Specialist – Virtual Experiences

Job Description

Arrow Electronics is a global provider of products, services, and solutions to industrial and commercial users of electronic components and enterprise computing solutions. Arrow Electronics guides innovation forward for over 220,000 leading technology manufacturers and service providers. With 2025 sales of $30.9 billion, Arrow develops technology solutions that improve business and daily life. The company maintains 228 locations worldwide with over 85 countries served.

We are looking for a dedicated and detail‑oriented Digital Marketing Specialist – Virtual Experiences to join our Marketing Center of Excellence. In this role, you will be responsible for the end‑to‑end planning, execution, and optimization of webinars and virtual events delivered to global audiences. This position offers an opportunity to work in a dynamic, international environment where operational excellence, process quality, and measurable business impact are key priorities.

What You’ll Be Doing


Planning and executing live webinars and virtual events end‑to‑end, including event setup, registration, live production, recording, and post‑event follow‑up.
Managing event logistics on virtual event platforms such as Microsoft Teams Live, ON24, GoToWebinar, or similar tools, ensuring a seamless attendee and speaker experience.
Building and coordinating event invitations and registrations, including audience segmentation, email communications, reminders, and real‑time registration monitoring.
Training and supporting internal and external speakers through platform guidance, rehearsals, and live technical moderation during events.
Acting as a virtual events platform administrator, maintaining templates, access, troubleshooting issues, and continuously improving engagement features such as polling, Q&A, or captions.
Managing a global virtual events calendar and collaborating with regional marketing teams across different time zones.
Coordinating with external agencies and vendors when additional production support is required, including budget and delivery oversight.
Tracking event performance and preparing post‑event reports covering attendance, engagement metrics, and lead or pipeline attribution.


What We Are Looking For


Hands‑on experience in planning and delivering webinars or virtual events end‑to‑end
Strong operational and process‑driven mindset, with attention to detail and quality standards.
Experience working with virtual event platforms (e.g. Microsoft Teams Live, ON24, GoToWebinar or similar).
Proven ability to manage and support speakers and stakeholders in a live, high‑pressure environment.
Experience working in an international context with cross‑regional teams and time zones.
Solid understanding of post‑event reporting, engagement metrics, and marketing performance tracking.


Work Arrangement

Hybrid: 3 days in office / 2 days work from home

What's In It For You

At Arrow, we recognize that financial rewards and great benefits are important aspects of an ideal job. That’s why we offer competitive financial compensation, including various compensation plans, and a solid benefits package.


30 days of Christmas bonus
40% vacation premium
12 vacation days plus 2 floating days
Vision and Dental Assistance
Life Insurance
Healthcare Insurance
10% Food/Pantry Vouchers
Restaurant Vouchers
13% Savings Fund
Access to Arrow’s Employee Discount Program
Growth Opportunities, and more!

$31,575.00 - $41,580.00 MXN Monthly

title: Remote Internship - Shopify Agency Alliances
description:
About the job

Job Type: Internship




Job Location: Mexico (Remote)

Company Description

Axentra OS is an innovative platform created to eliminate inefficiencies in Shopify stores by automating complexities and streamlining operations. It offers an all-in-one operating system that integrates 33 applications (more are being added) such as logins, customer accounts, order management, exchanges, returns, refunds, reviews, referrals, subscriptions, CRM, engagement tools, revenue generation, analytics, and more. Designed for operational control and scalable growth, Axentra OS provides seamless workflows and refined customer experiences. It helps merchants overcome the fragmentation in e-commerce with beautiful, intuitive interfaces and merchant-centric solutions.




More about us here — https://www.axentraos.com

and here — https://apps.shopify.com/axentra-customer-command-centre




With us, you’ll learn the fundamentals of how modern commerce moves. You’ll connect with founders, marketers, and decision-makers building the next generation of e-commerce brands. You’ll see how conversations turn into strategy, and how technology becomes the edge that defines success.

description:
About the job

Responsibilities

About the Team

The commerce industry has seen tremendous growth in recent years and has become a hotly contested space amongst leading Internet companies, and its future growth cannot be underestimated. We aim to bring discovery, inspiration, and joy back to shopping by making TikTok the commerce channel of choice for merchants, creators, and affiliates.

You've seen the virality and impact of #TikTokMadeMeBuyIt. Come join the team that is helping scale that phenomenon, and pioneer Content & Creator commerce in the LATAM. We aim to bring discovery, inspiration, and joy back to shopping by making TikTok the leading, on-trend commerce platform of choice for brands, creators, and shoppers. We are an entrepreneurial team, passionate about shaping the future of shopping.

The TikTok Shop LATAM operation team aims to deliver high quality products together with a unique customer experience via TikTok. The team is responsible for building the TikTok E-commerce partnership for the TikTok e-commerce business in the US. With more than 1 billion loyal users globally, we believe TikTok is an ideal platform to deliver a brand new and better e-commerce experience to our users. We are looking for passionate and talented people to join us to build an e-commerce ecosystem that is innovative, secure and intuitive for our users together.

As a project intern, you will have the opportunity to engage in impactful short-term projects that provide you with a glimpse of professional real-world experience. You will gain practical skills through on-the-job learning in a fast-paced work environment and develop a deeper understanding of your career interests.

Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis - we encourage you to apply early.

Successful candidates must be able to commit to at least 6 months long internship period.

Responsibilities:


 Support the creator education strategy for TikTok Shop, including the design and production of educational content (videos, guides, tutorials) aimed at improving content quality and platform knowledge.
 Set up, write, and execute creator communications across channels such as Push, Inbox, WhatsApp, and Email, including copywriting, message setup, and campaign deployment, ensuring proper segmentation, clarity, and performance focus (CTR, OR).
 Own the management and day-to-day operations of WhatsApp creator communities, including content sharing, moderation, follow-ups, and coordination around key initiatives.
 Collaborate closely with content agencies to coordinate deliverables, review scripts, provide feedback, and ensure alignment with marketing and performance objectives.
 Support the execution and follow-up of key TikTok Shop campaigns (e.g., competitions, missions, and special initiatives), ensuring educational and communication materials are correctly implemented across channels.
 Research and analyze creator education and marketing strategies from other markets to propose improvements and adaptations.


Qualifications

Minimum Qualifications:


 Applicants are kindly requested to submit an English-language resume
 Currently pursuing an Undergraduate/Master in Business or a related major.
 Strong interest in digital content, creator marketing, TikTok, and the e-commerce ecosystem.
 Solid communication skills, strategic thinking, and a results-oriented mindset.
 Experience or strong interest in content production (video, scripting, copywriting), ideally with familiarity with TikTok-style content.


Preferred Qualifications:


 Familiarity with TikTok content ecosystem, shoppable content, and brand-creator partnerships is a plus


For TikTok

By submitting an application for this role, you accept and agree to our global applicant privacy policy, which may be accessed here: https://careers.tiktok.com/legal/privacy

Job Information

About TikTok

TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.

Why Join Us

Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.

We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.

Diversity & Inclusion

TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.

TikTok Accommodation

TikTok is committed to providing reasonable accommodations in our recruitment processes for candidates with disabilities, pregnancy, sincerely held religious beliefs or other reasons protected by applicable laws. If you need assistance or a reasonable accommodation, please reach out to us at https://tinyurl.com/RA-request

description:
About the job

We are one of the fastest-growing private youth sports operators in the GTA and Florida. We delivery high-quality, structured sports programming across multiple locations, with a focus on fun, skills development, and exceptional customer experiences.

This is an entry-level role for someone who has foundational knowledge of email or digital marketing and wants to develop deep expertise in lifecycle campaigns, automation, and data-driven optimization. You will work side by side with the Director of Marketing, building real skills in platforms like Twilio and SendGrid while contributing to campaigns that directly impact customer acquisition and retention.

If you are analytical, curious, detail-oriented, and excited about how data and messaging come together to drive results — we want to meet you.

WHY JOIN US

We are a growing company in the sports industry, and our marketing team is at the core of our expansion. This role is an opportunity to go beyond sending emails — you will learn the strategy, the technology, and the data behind lifecycle marketing at a company that moves fast and values results.


Mentorship from experienced marketers and direct access to senior leadership
Hands-on work with enterprise platforms (Twilio, SendGrid) from day one
A culture that rewards curiosity, precision, and ownership
Flexible remote or hybrid work arrangement
A real growth path toward a full Lifecycle Marketing Specialist or Marketing Analyst role


Key Responsibilities

Campaign Execution & Support


Assist in building, scheduling, QAing, and launching email and SMS campaigns using Twilio and SendGrid under senior supervision
Help set up and QA automated lifecycle flows including onboarding sequences, re-engagement campaigns, retention triggers, and other lifecycle marketing initiatives
Support the management of audience lists, segmentation criteria, suppression files, and workflow documentation
Assist in preparing and formatting email templates in collaboration with the design team
Coordinate campaign timelines, internal deliverables, and marketing calendars to ensure campaigns launch on schedule
Maintain organized libraries of marketing assets, templates, and campaign documentation


Testing & Performance Tracking


Support A/B test setup and help document results for subject lines, CTAs, and content variants
Assist with campaign testing, tracking, and reporting across email and SMS channels
Compile and maintain performance reports tracking key metrics including open rates, click-through rates, conversions, engagement, and unsubscribes
Assist in identifying trends in campaign data and flagging opportunities for optimization and process improvements


Compliance & Operations


Help ensure all campaigns comply with applicable regulations including CASL, CAN-SPAM, and GDPR
Assist with list hygiene tasks including managing bounces, opt-outs, and suppression lists
Maintain documentation of campaign workflows, platform settings, operational processes, and process guides
Support ongoing improvements to marketing processes and operational workflows


Collaboration


Work closely with the Director of Marketing and senior team members to align on campaign priorities and goals
Coordinate with marketing, design, and content teams to ensure campaigns are executed accurately, assets are delivered on time, and messaging remains on brand
Participate in team meetings, contribute ideas, and ask questions


Requirements

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS


Up to 1-2 years of experience in email marketing, digital marketing, or related roles (internships and relevant coursework count)
Basic familiarity with email marketing concepts: deliverability, segmentation, open rates, click-through rates
Comfortable working with data and digital tools; not afraid of dashboards or spreadsheets
Strong attention to detail: you notice what others miss and take quality seriously
Great written communication skills in English
Eagerness to learn marketing platforms and grow into a technical marketing role

Preferred Skills & Experience


Any hands-on experience with an email platform (Mailchimp, HubSpot, Klaviyo, SendGrid, or similar)

Familiarity with A/B testing concepts
Basic HTML knowledge or willingness to learn email templating

title: Product Marketing Specialist (Product Planning)
description:
About the job

Shape the future of healthcare innovation across Latin America.




At OMRON Healthcare, we're looking for a Product Marketing Specialist (Product Planning) to help define the next generation of healthcare products across the Latin American market.




This is more than a product marketing role.

You'll partner with global teams in Japan and cross-functional leaders across the region to identify market opportunities, evaluate new product innovations, and lead product launches that improve people's lives.




From concept to commercialization, you'll play a key role in shaping our product portfolio and bringing innovative healthcare solutions to market.




What you'll do

✅ Lead the product lifecycle management for assigned product categories across Latin America.

✅ Support new product planning and commercialization from concept through market launch.

✅ Analyze market trends, customer needs, competitive activity, and pricing to identify business opportunities.

✅ Develop product positioning and launch plans aligned with regional business objectives.

✅ Collaborate with Global Product Planning teams in Japan to evaluate and introduce new products into the LATAM portfolio.

✅ Coordinate cross-functional initiatives with Sales, Marketing, Medical Marketing, Regulatory Affairs, Supply Chain, Finance, and Customer Service.

✅ Monitor portfolio performance and recommend product lifecycle strategies to maximize growth and profitability.

✅ Support pricing strategy, product documentation, packaging, labeling, and commercialization readiness.







What we're looking for




✔ Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Engineering, Life Sciences, or a related field.

✔ Advanced English with confidence communicating directly with global stakeholders.

✔ +3 years of experience in Product Marketing, Product Planning, Product Management, Brand Management, Category Management, or Portfolio Management.

✔ Experience supporting new product launches and product lifecycle management.

✔ Strong analytical skills with experience conducting market research, competitive analysis, and business planning.

✔ Experience working with cross-functional teams in a multinational environment.




✔ Strong project management, communication, and organizational skills.




Why OMRON Healthcare?

At OMRON Healthcare, innovation starts with our people.

This role offers a unique opportunity to work directly with global Product Planning teams, influence the future product portfolio for Latin America, and help bring meaningful healthcare innovations to millions of consumers.

If you're passionate about innovation, product strategy, and making a real business impact, we'd love to hear from you.




📍 Location: Mexico City, Mexico (Hybrid)




Apply today and help shape the future of healthcare innovation.

Live the OMRON experience and shape the future with US!

description:
About the job

This role is open to candidates based in LATAM, Africa, and Eastern Europe. Please note that as this role supports U.S.-based clients, candidates must be available to work during U.S. business hours aligned with the client’s time zone.

Our client is a growing commercial and multifamily construction company focused on strengthening its digital presence and increasing visibility across both traditional search engines and emerging AI-powered search platforms. They are seeking an SEO & AI Search Optimization Specialist to improve organic search performance, optimize content for Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), and position the company as an authoritative resource within the construction industry.

Role Overview

The SEO & AI Search Optimization Specialist will be responsible for improving the company's visibility across Google, Bing, and AI-powered search platforms such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity. The SEO & AI Search Optimization Specialist will conduct SEO audits, optimize website content and technical SEO, develop search-driven content strategies, implement AEO best practices, and monitor website performance. This role is ideal for someone with strong SEO expertise who is passionate about the future of AI-powered search and enjoys combining technical optimization with content strategy.

Location

Fully Remote (Work from Home)

Key Responsibilities

Search Engine Optimization


Conduct comprehensive SEO audits and identify growth opportunities.
Optimize on-page SEO across key website pages.
Improve metadata, internal linking, site structure, and technical SEO.
Monitor keyword rankings, search visibility, and organic traffic.
Develop and execute SEO strategies that improve search performance.


AI Search & Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)


Implement best practices for AI-powered search optimization.
Optimize website content for Answer Engine Optimization (AEO).
Research emerging AI search technologies and trends.
Develop strategies that improve authority, relevance, and discoverability across AI platforms.
Monitor visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search channels.


Content Strategy & Optimization


Conduct keyword and topic research.
Develop SEO-driven content calendars and content strategies.
Create content briefs and optimization recommendations.
Improve existing website content to increase search rankings and engagement.
Identify opportunities for new content development.


Website Growth & Performance


Collaborate on website optimization initiatives.
Improve user experience through SEO and content recommendations.
Monitor website analytics and search performance metrics.
Deliver SEO performance reports and recommendations to leadership.


Qualifications Experience


2+ years of experience in SEO.
Experience improving organic rankings and website traffic.
Experience developing SEO content strategies and content optimization initiatives.
Experience conducting SEO audits and technical SEO improvements.
Experience using website analytics and SEO reporting.
Experience within construction, real estate, architecture, engineering, or related industries is a plus.


Qualifications Skills


Strong understanding of modern SEO best practices.
Experience with Google Search Console.
Experience with Google Analytics.
Experience using Ahrefs.
Experience using Semrush.
Experience using Moz.
Experience with WordPress or similar CMS platforms.
Familiarity with AI-assisted content workflows.
Understanding of Answer Engine Optimization (AEO).
Understanding of AI-powered search trends.
Strong analytical and reporting skills.
Excellent written communication skills.
Strong attention to detail and problem-solving abilities.


What Success Looks Like


Organic traffic and keyword rankings consistently improve.
Website visibility increases across both traditional and AI-powered search platforms.
SEO-driven content generates higher engagement and qualified traffic.
Leadership receives clear reporting and actionable SEO insights.
The company's digital authority continues to grow through effective SEO and AEO strategies.


Opportunity

This is an opportunity to help shape the digital growth strategy of a rapidly expanding construction company while working at the forefront of both traditional SEO and AI-powered search optimization. The SEO & AI Search Optimization Specialist will play a critical role in increasing organic visibility, improving website performance, and preparing the business for the future of search.

Application Process

Fill in the application form
Record a video showcasing your skill sets

description:
About the job




¿Eres una persona orientada a los detalles con pasión por la investigación y una buena comprensión de la geografía nacional y local? Esta oportunidad de trabajo independiente te permite trabajar a tu propio ritmo y desde la comodidad de tu hogar.

Completar tareas de investigación y evaluación en un entorno basado en web, como verificar y comparar datos, y determinar la relevancia y precisión de la información.

¡Únete a nosotros hoy y sé parte de un equipo dinámico e innovador que está marcando la diferencia en el mundo!





TELUS Digital AI Communit

yNuestra Comunidad Global de IA es una red vibrante de más de 1 millón de colaboradores de diversos orígenes que ayudan a nuestros clientes a recopilar, mejorar, entrenar, traducir y localizar contenido para construir mejores modelos de IA. Conviértete en parte de nuestra comunidad en crecimiento y haz un impacto apoyando los modelos de aprendizaje automático de algunas de las marcas más grandes del mundo

.Ruta de Calificació

nNo se requiere experiencia profesional previa para solicitar este rol; sin embargo, trabajar en este proyecto requerirá que pases los requisitos básicos y pases por un proceso de evaluación estándar. Este es un proyecto a tiempo parcial a largo plazo y tu trabajo estará sujeto a nuestras verificaciones estándar de control de calidad durante el término de este acuerdo

.Requisitos Básicos

 Dominio Profesional Completo del inglés y español. Ser residente en México durante los últimos 5 años consecutivos y tener familiaridad con los asuntos comerciales, mediáticos, deportivos, de noticias, redes sociales y culturales actuales e históricos de México. Capacidad para seguir directrices y realizar investigaciones en línea utilizando motores de búsqueda, mapas en línea e información de sitios web. Flexibilidad para trabajar en una diversa gama de tipos de tareas, incluidos mapas, noticias, tareas de audio y relevancia Acceso diario a una conexión internet, computadora y software relevante

title: Marketing Data Scientist, Data & AI Enablement
skills: Collaborate closely with the Snowflake engineering team to define, spec, and validate data requirements for models and AI applications
Serve as the translation layer between data engineering and AI/ML teams, ensuring data is structured, clean, and optimized for downstream use
Enable and support agentic AI workflows by designing and maintaining the data layers that power agent memory, context retrieval, and tool-use
Build and maintain data models and transformation logic on top of Snowflake to support predictive and generative AI use cases
Identify and resolve data quality issues in collaboration with the engineering team
Partner with marketing science and analytics teams to ensure data assets are accessible and model-ready
Automate and streamline data validation processes to improve reliability of AI-facing data pipelines
Deep fluency in Snowflake - comfortable living in it daily as a power user, and confident enough to hold technical conversations with Snowflake engineers
A strong understanding of how data must be structured and governed to reliably power AI and machine learning systems
The ability to translate business and modeling needs into precise, actionable data requirements for engineering teams
A collaborative mindset with the ability to operate effectively across data engineering, AI, and marketing science functions
A proactive, self-starter approach capable of navigating ambiguous data environments and proposing pragmatic solutions
8 years of experience in Data Science or a data engineering-adjacent role
Advanced proficiency in Python and SQL
Deep expertise in Snowflake - including data modeling, Snowpark, and advanced querying
Approximately 2 years of hands-on experience powering agentic AI workflows with data (e.g., RAG pipelines, structured data for LLM tool-calling, agent memory and context layers)
Familiarity with vector databases or embedding-based retrieval systems (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector)
Experience collaborating with or working closely alongside data engineering teams
Familiarity with cloud data platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
Snowflake - Snowpark, dynamic tables, advanced SQL querying, data modeling
Python - pandas, NumPy, SQLAlchemy, Jupyter
LLM & Agentic AI Frameworks - LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen, or similar
Vector Databases - Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector, or Chroma
Cloud Platforms - AWS (S3, Lambda, SageMaker), GCP (BigQuery, Vertex AI), or Azure equivalents
Orchestration & Pipeline Tools - dbt, Apache Airflow, or Prefect (as a collaborator/power user)
Version Control - Git/GitHub or GitLab
Data Quality & Observability - Monte Carlo, Great Expectations, or similar
API & Integration Tools - REST APIs, Webhooks, JSON/YAML fluency for connecting data to AI systems
Experience with orchestration tools such as dbt, Airflow, or similar
Exposure to marketing data ecosystems (CDP platforms, ad platform data structures)
Experience in a B2B SaaS environment
Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in a quantitative field such as Computer Science, Statistics, or Data Engineering
description:
About the job

Join Vonage and help us innovate cloud communications for businesses worldwide!

Why This Role Matters

We are looking for a Data Scientist who speaks the language of both data and AI - and knows how to make them work together. You will serve as the critical bridge between our Snowflake data platform and the AI-powered systems that drive our marketing and go-to-market motions. Your work will ensure that our data is shaped, structured, and ready to power the next generation of agentic AI applications, enabling autonomous, intelligent systems that act on behalf of our teams and customers.

Your Key Responsibilities


Collaborate closely with the Snowflake engineering team to define, spec, and validate data requirements for models and AI applications
Serve as the translation layer between data engineering and AI/ML teams, ensuring data is structured, clean, and optimized for downstream use
Enable and support agentic AI workflows by designing and maintaining the data layers that power agent memory, context retrieval, and tool-use
Build and maintain data models and transformation logic on top of Snowflake to support predictive and generative AI use cases
Identify and resolve data quality issues in collaboration with the engineering team
Partner with marketing science and analytics teams to ensure data assets are accessible and model-ready
Automate and streamline data validation processes to improve reliability of AI-facing data pipelines


What You'll Bring


Deep fluency in Snowflake - comfortable living in it daily as a power user, and confident enough to hold technical conversations with Snowflake engineers
A strong understanding of how data must be structured and governed to reliably power AI and machine learning systems
The ability to translate business and modeling needs into precise, actionable data requirements for engineering teams
A collaborative mindset with the ability to operate effectively across data engineering, AI, and marketing science functions
A proactive, self-starter approach capable of navigating ambiguous data environments and proposing pragmatic solutions


Required


8 years of experience in Data Science or a data engineering-adjacent role
Advanced proficiency in Python and SQL
Deep expertise in Snowflake - including data modeling, Snowpark, and advanced querying
Approximately 2 years of hands-on experience powering agentic AI workflows with data (e.g., RAG pipelines, structured data for LLM tool-calling, agent memory and context layers)
Familiarity with vector databases or embedding-based retrieval systems (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector)
Experience collaborating with or working closely alongside data engineering teams
Familiarity with cloud data platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)


Tools & Technologies


Snowflake - Snowpark, dynamic tables, advanced SQL querying, data modeling
Python - pandas, NumPy, SQLAlchemy, Jupyter
LLM & Agentic AI Frameworks - LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen, or similar
Vector Databases - Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector, or Chroma
Cloud Platforms - AWS (S3, Lambda, SageMaker), GCP (BigQuery, Vertex AI), or Azure equivalents
Orchestration & Pipeline Tools - dbt, Apache Airflow, or Prefect (as a collaborator/power user)
Version Control - Git/GitHub or GitLab
Data Quality & Observability - Monte Carlo, Great Expectations, or similar
API & Integration Tools - REST APIs, Webhooks, JSON/YAML fluency for connecting data to AI systems


What We Consider a Plus


Experience with orchestration tools such as dbt, Airflow, or similar
Exposure to marketing data ecosystems (CDP platforms, ad platform data structures)
Experience in a B2B SaaS environment
Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in a quantitative field such as Computer Science, Statistics, or Data Engineering


Disclaimer: The posted range represents the good faith salary for this role at the time of posting. Final compensation is determined by factors including (but not limited to) geographic location, relevant experience, specific skill sets, and internal equity.

There’s no perfect candidate. You don't need all the preferred qualifications to make a valuable impact on our team. Our employees and customers come from diverse backgrounds, so if you're passionate about what you could achieve at Vonage, we'd love to hear from you.

To learn how we process your personal data during the recruitment process, please refer to our Privacy Notice.

Who We Are

Vonage is a global cloud communications leader. And your talent will further help brands - such as Airbnb, Viber, WhatsApp, and Snapchat - accelerate their digital transformation through our fully programmable-based unified communications, contact center solutions, and communications APIs. Ready to innovate? Then join us today.

Note: The purpose of this profile is to provide a general summary of essential responsibilities for the position and is not meant as an exhaustive list. Assignments may differ for individuals within the same role based on business conditions, departmental need or geographic location.

title: Marketing Coordinator, Brands & Influencer (LATAM Remote)
description:
About the job

About Selkirk Sport

At Selkirk Sport, we’re passionate about pushing the boundaries of pickleball innovation. Our mission is to Fuel the Pickleball Obsession by creating the sport’s premier products and ecosystem. As a leading global brand in premium pickleball equipment, we’re expanding our international presence and seeking top-tier talent to support our growth in the U.S. and abroad.

We pride ourselves on a culture of excellence, collaboration, and continuous improvement. Selkirk applies first-principles thinking to design scalable, process-driven systems that create lasting operational advantage.

Marketing Coordinator, Brands & Influencer

Location: Fully remote within Latin America

Department: Integrated Marketing

Reports to: Director of Integrated Marketing

The Opportunity

Great marketing is more than creative ideas. It is execution, coordination, and the systems behind the scenes that keep everything moving.

At Selkirk, we are building a modern marketing engine that supports multiple brands, campaigns, and influencer initiatives across a rapidly growing global ecosystem. We are looking for a Marketing Coordinator, Brands & Influencer who thrives in organization, loves bringing order to complexity, and wants a front-row seat to how high-performing campaigns come to life.

This is not a role for someone who simply wants to observe marketing. This is for someone who wants to be in the middle of it. You will help keep campaigns on track, support influencer partnerships, coordinate moving pieces across teams, and become part of the operational engine behind some of the fastest-growing brands in pickleball.

For the right person, this role provides a strong foundation and growth path into future opportunities in campaign management, brand marketing, and influencer partnerships.

What You'll Do

Campaign Coordination & Brand Support

Maintain and manage the master marketing calendar, ensuring teams have visibility into active projects, campaign timelines, and launch priorities

Provide day-to-day support across multiple brands by coordinating tasks, monitoring project updates, and keeping workflows organized and on schedule

Track creative assets through production pipelines and ensure deliverables reach the appropriate teams at the right time

Support consistent campaign execution by following established brand standards, playbooks, and workflows

Influencer Partnerships & Logistics

Own the operational logistics behind influencer gifting and seeding programs, including product coordination, shipment tracking, and documentation

Support creator briefing and content review processes to ensure campaigns continue moving efficiently

Maintain organized records of creator lists, campaign assets, shipping details, and project documentation

Assist in gathering campaign performance information and supporting influencer reporting efforts

Operations & Execution

Support the systems and day-to-day processes that help marketing initiatives scale efficiently

Ensure project updates are clearly communicated across Marketing, Creative, and Media teams

Help identify opportunities to improve organization, streamline workflows, and reduce operational bottlenecks

Contribute to building repeatable systems that support future growth

Who You Are

Operationally Minded: You naturally create structure and enjoy bringing organization to fast-moving projects with multiple stakeholders

Detail Oriented: You notice the small things and understand that successful execution often depends on details others overlook

Collaborative: You communicate effectively and enjoy working across teams and functions

Tech Savvy: You are comfortable learning new tools, systems, and workflows and can adapt quickly in a remote environment

Growth Focused: You are eager to gain exposure across marketing disciplines and excited to build your career within a fast-paced organization

Experienced: You bring 2–5 years of experience in marketing operations, influencer coordination, project support, or high-volume administrative environments

What Success Looks Like

Campaigns remain organized, visible, and on schedule across teams

Influencer gifting and creator programs operate smoothly with minimal logistical issues

Creative assets move efficiently through production and launch processes

Marketing teams have clear visibility into projects, priorities, and timelines

Operational systems continue evolving to support scale and growth

The Details

Compensation: Compensation will be aligned to local market rates and candidate experience within the hiring region.

Location: Fully remote within Latin America.

Why Selkirk

We move fast, think differently, and operate with intention.

This is an opportunity to gain hands-on experience inside a growing global brand while helping build the systems and workflows behind large-scale campaigns and influencer initiatives.

If you are energized by organization, excited by marketing, and motivated by helping teams execute at a high level, we'd love to hear from you.

Selkirk is an equal opportunity employer. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete the application or participate in the interview process, please reach out to hr@selkirk.com.
